LangGraph Operations Console

SignalBrief

An observable, bounded LangGraph JS agent that turns current AI-agent news into a grounded, critiqued newsletter.

ready
No run active

⚡ Autonomous mode: The LangGraph agent will plan, research, summarize, critique, and output the newsletter without pausing.
